criteria.name: feasibility
criteria.description: Can this be built with available tools and reasonable effort?
criteria.rubric: 1-3: requires technology that doesn't exist or extreme effort. 4-6: buildable but significant unknowns. 7-9: clearly buildable with known tech. 10: trivial to build.

criteria.name: clarity
criteria.description: Is the brief unambiguous? Could a developer start working from this?
criteria.rubric: 1-3: vague, contradictory, or missing key details. 4-6: mostly clear but some ambiguity. 7-9: clear and actionable. 10: crystal clear, no questions.

criteria.name: completeness
criteria.description: Are user stories, technical approach, and risks adequately covered?
criteria.rubric: 1-3: major gaps. 4-6: covers basics but missing edge cases. 7-9: thorough. 10: comprehensive.

criteria.name: originality
criteria.description: Is this worth building? Does it solve a real problem?
criteria.rubric: 1-3: no clear value. 4-6: incremental value. 7-9: clear value. 10: compelling.

criteria.name: scopeAppropriate
criteria.description: Is the scope achievable in a reasonable number of agent sessions?
criteria.rubric: 1-3: would take hundreds of sessions. 4-6: large but possible. 7-9: well-scoped. 10: minimal scope, quick build.
